EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IMSegmentation2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to additional linear referencing operations on polylines.

[Guid("B80D4790-F452-11D3-9F69-00C04F6BDD7F")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IMSegmentation2 : IMSegmentation, IMCollection

fromM double

Returns

IGeometryCollection

GetSubcurveBetweenMsEx(double, double, ref int, ref int)

Returns a polyline geometry corresponding to the subcurve(s) between the fromM and the toM values. The 'details' arguments are composed of esriMCurveRelationEnum values.

IGeometryCollection GetSubcurveBetweenMsEx(double fromM, double toM, ref int fromMDetails, ref int toMDetails)

Parameters

fromM double
toM double
fromMDetails int
toMDetails int

Returns

IGeometryCollection

Origin IPoint
Scale double
Offset double
ignoreGaps bool

UpdateMsByDistance(int, int, int, int, double, double, int, bool)

Updates Ms along the shortest path between the specified endpoints. The interpolation ratio is determined by the input ms and euclidean distance along that path. The update method is given as a combination of esriGeometryUpdateMEnum values.

void UpdateMsByDistance(int fromPart, int FromPoint, int toPart, int ToPoint, double fromM, double toM, int updateHow, bool ignoreGaps)

Parameters

fromPart int
FromPoint int
toPart int
ToPoint int
fromM double
toM double
updateHow int
ignoreGaps bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

UpdateMsByMs(int, int, int, int, double, double, int)

Updates Ms along the shortest path between the specified endpoints. The interpolation ratio is determined by the existing ms along that path and the input ms. The update method is given as a combination of esriGeometryUpdateMEnum values.

void UpdateMsByMs(int fromPart, int FromPoint, int toPart, int ToPoint, double fromM, double toM, int updateHow)

Parameters

fromPart int
FromPoint int
toPart int
ToPoint int
fromM double
toM double
updateHow int

Examples
